name: Applied Materials / 应用材料
summary: 应用材料提供晶圆制造设备和服务，是先进逻辑、存储和封装产线的重要设备供应商，间接受益于 NVIDIA AI 芯片供应链扩产。 / Applied Materials provides wafer-fabrication equipment and services for advanced logic, memory, and packaging lines, giving it indirect exposure to NVIDIA AI chip supply-chain expansion.
summaryZh: 应用材料提供晶圆制造设备和服务，是先进逻辑、存储和封装产线的重要设备供应商，间接受益于 NVIDIA AI 芯片供应链扩产。
summaryEn: Applied Materials provides wafer-fabrication equipment and services for advanced logic, memory, and packaging lines, giving it indirect exposure to NVIDIA AI chip supply-chain expansion.

business.description: 公司提供材料工程设备、服务和软件，覆盖沉积、刻蚀、离子注入、热处理、量测和封装等环节。 / The company provides materials-engineering equipment, services, and software across deposition, etch, implant, thermal processing, metrology, and packaging.
business.descriptionZh: 公司提供材料工程设备、服务和软件，覆盖沉积、刻蚀、离子注入、热处理、量测和封装等环节。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides materials-engineering equipment, services, and software across deposition, etch, implant, thermal processing, metrology, and packaging.
revenueModel: 应用全球服务 / applied global services
显示及相关市场 / display and adjacent markets

business.thesis: NVIDIA 相关性来自先进制程和 HBM/封装扩产所需的制程设备，而非直接面向 NVIDIA 的终端销售。 / The NVIDIA link comes from process-equipment demand for advanced nodes, HBM, and packaging capacity rather than direct end sales to NVIDIA.
business.thesisZh: NVIDIA 相关性来自先进制程和 HBM/封装扩产所需的制程设备，而非直接面向 NVIDIA 的终端销售。
business.thesisEn: The NVIDIA link comes from process-equipment demand for advanced nodes, HBM, and packaging capacity rather than direct end sales to NVIDIA.
riskNotes: 晶圆厂资本开支周期会放大收入波动。 / Wafer-fab capex cycles can amplify revenue volatility.
中国出口限制和客户扩产延后会影响订单可见度。 / China restrictions and customer fab delays can affect order visibility.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈

relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

tiers.title: NVIDIA-related demand path

entities.name: TSMC / 台积电
entities.relationship: 先进晶圆厂客户；其先进制程扩产是设备需求的重要来源。
entities.relationshipZh: 先进晶圆厂客户；其先进制程扩产是设备需求的重要来源。
entities.relationshipEn: Advanced foundry customer; its leading-node expansion is an important source of equipment demand.
entities.customerRole: 晶圆厂客户 / 设备需求方
entities.customerRoleZh: 晶圆厂客户 / 设备需求方

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: NVIDIA 需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂或封装投资间接传导，不等同于直接采购关系。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: NVIDIA 需求通过晶圆厂、存储厂或封装投资间接传导，不等同于直接采购关系。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: NVIDIA demand transmits indirectly through foundry, memory, or packaging investment and is not the same as a direct purchasing relationship.

entities.name: NVIDIA Corporation / 英伟达
entities.relationship: 不是典型直接客户；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过台积电、存储厂和先进封装投资间接拉动设备需求。
entities.relationshipZh: 不是典型直接客户；NVIDIA AI 芯片需求通过台积电、存储厂和先进封装投资间接拉动设备需求。
entities.relationshipEn: Not typically a direct customer; NVIDIA AI-chip demand indirectly drives equipment demand through foundries, memory makers, and advanced-packaging investment.
